random_hyperedge_null.note: All value-bearing lineages collapse to META_CONTINUITY_LA_eq_LB (+LIN_EG with SEED_A=0), so independent-anchor count is <=2 in ANY re-targeting; the gate retains 0 under the null as well — the real-data zero is structural (lineage accounting), and the real lattice is NOT distinguishable from random re-targetings at gate level.
